1	#!/bin/bash
2	# Build queue for first 7 A1 modules — Plan A override 2026-05-13
3	# Stops on first non-zero exit code (HARD audit gate failure).
4	# stdout: queue-level events only (notifications).
5	# stderr: full v7_build.py stream (captured in Monitor output file for on-demand reading).
6	
7	set -uo pipefail
8	cd /Users/krisztiankoos/projects/learn-ukrainian
9	
10	MODULES=(
11	  sounds-letters-and-hello
12	  reading-ukrainian
13	  special-signs
14	  stress-and-melody
15	  who-am-i
16	  my-family
17	  checkpoint-first-contact
18	)
19	
20	i=0
21	for slug in "${MODULES[@]}"; do
22	  i=$((i+1))
23	  ts=$(date -u +%FT%TZ)
24	  echo "{\"event\":\"queue_build_start\",\"slug\":\"$slug\",\"index\":$i,\"total\":${#MODULES[@]},\"ts\":\"$ts\"}"
25	
26	  # Redirect v7_build's verbose output to stderr (captured in output file but
27	  # NOT a notification). Run with -u for unbuffered stdout.
28	  .venv/bin/python -u scripts/build/v7_build.py a1 "$slug" >&2
29	  rc=$?
30	
31	  ts=$(date -u +%FT%TZ)
32	  if [ "$rc" -eq 0 ]; then
33	    echo "{\"event\":\"queue_build_done\",\"slug\":\"$slug\",\"index\":$i,\"exit_code\":0,\"ts\":\"$ts\"}"
34	  else
35	    echo "{\"event\":\"queue_halted\",\"slug\":\"$slug\",\"index\":$i,\"exit_code\":$rc,\"reason\":\"v7_build non-zero exit ($rc) — HARD gate failure or other error\",\"ts\":\"$ts\"}"
36	    exit 1
37	  fi
38	done
39	ts=$(date -u +%FT%TZ)
40	echo "{\"event\":\"queue_complete\",\"total\":${#MODULES[@]},\"ts\":\"$ts\"}"
